title: physalis viscosa subsp. maritima
intro: Physalis viscosa subsp. maritima is a subspecies of the Physalis viscosa plant, belonging to the nightshade family, Solanaceae, and is commonly known as the coastal ground cherry. It is native to the Mediterranean region and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Physalis viscosa subsp. maritima include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and act as an antimicrobial agent, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its leaves, fruits, and flowers can be dried and used as a natural remedy for various ailments.
